name: boxcutter
description: Boxcutter - ephemeral dev environment VMs powered by Firecracker microVMs

plugins.name: boxcutter
plugins.description: Manage ephemeral dev environment VMs using Boxcutter. Firecracker microVMs that boot in ~1 second with real LAN IPs and SSH access. Use when users need a fresh dev environment, want to test in a clean VM, need isolated compute, or mention Boxcutter.
